description: Customer-hosted read-only MCP server for Jobber ops reports, OAuth setup, and GraphQL validation.
name: io.github.opsconduit/jobber-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Jobber developer app client id for customer-owned OAuth setup.
environmentVariables.name: JOBBER_CLIENT_ID

environmentVariables.description: Jobber developer app client secret. Keep local; do not email or publish.
environmentVariables.name: JOBBER_CLIENT_SECRET

environmentVariables.description: OAuth redirect URI, usually http://localhost:3333/oauth/callback for local setup.
environmentVariables.name: JOBBER_REDIRECT_URI

title: OpsConduit Jobber MCP
